THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ELITE SAN FRANCISCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WIDJAJA SUSANA $1,441.00 PRINCIPAL, $44.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,485.00, DEFENDANT'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT TO PROVIDE FOR INSTALLMENT PAYMENTS GRANTED.
